nature_papers.title: Hybrid Multi-Agent Pipeline with MCP Routing
nature_papers.key_method: 5-stage multi-agent + Model Context Protocol hybrid routing
nature_papers.algorithm: Policy-guided routing with predefined trigger conditions → delegate complex numerics to external solver (MATLAB)
nature_papers.result: Iterative verification increased pass rates significantly; compliant engineering reports
nature_papers.applicable_to_brain: Quality gate trigger conditions: when single model output fails structural checks, auto-cascade to multi-model

nature_papers.title: Decentralized Adaptive Task Allocation for Dynamic MAS
nature_papers.key_method: SPSA optimization + consensus-based synchronization for distributed coordination
nature_papers.algorithm: Two-layer decentralized architecture: controllers predict task parameters via recursive regression, selectively broadcast to relevant agents only (limited visibility routing)
nature_papers.result: Robust to behavioral drift, non-stationary feedback, delayed observability
nature_papers.applicable_to_brain: Adaptive K selection under uncertainty: use SPSA-like stochastic optimization to tune difficulty thresholds over time

nature_papers.title: Unified Multimodal GenAI with GraphRAG + MAS
nature_papers.key_method: GraphRAG + multi-agent orchestration with task classification and agent routing
nature_papers.algorithm: Custom 175B LLM trained on 2.5T tokens; GraphRAG beats baselines 23% on exact-match, 46% on multi-hop reasoning
nature_papers.result: 96.8% agreement with professional recruiters on ATS task
nature_papers.applicable_to_brain: Knowledge-graph-based routing: use task-type classification to route to specific model combinations (like our feature extraction but with learned embeddings)

nature_papers.title: Routing Stability in Swarm-Based Multi-Agent Dialogue
nature_papers.key_method: DeBERTa-based router + confidence-aware gating + FLAN-T5 generation
nature_papers.algorithm: Confidence-aware gating: routing accuracy 0.77 vs baseline 0.65. Switching instability reduced from 0.44→0.11, cascade errors from 0.09→0.01
nature_papers.applicable_to_brain: Confidence gating: our quality_gate() should use confidence threshold, not just length check. Add DeBERTa-style confidence scoring.

key_insights: Confidence-aware gating (Nature 2025): Router should estimate confidence BEFORE calling models, not after
Policy-guided triggers (Nature 2026): Hard rules for when to cascade (like our trap_single), but learned from data
SPSA optimization (Nature 2025): Use stochastic perturbation to tune K thresholds online, not fixed
GraphRAG routing (Nature 2026): Task embeddings -> model selection, not keyword matching
